title: elaeocarpus batudulangii subsp. batudulangii
intro: Elaeocarpus batudulangii subsp. batudulangii is a plant species belonging to the Elaeocarpaceae family, commonly found in the Philippines, known for its medicinal properties and traditional uses. The plant is reported to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Elaeocarpus batudulangii subsp. batudulangii is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects. The plant's extracts are also used in various folk medicine practices to promote overall health and well-being.
